fighter.label: 戦士
fighter.desc: a sturdy fighter girl in polished plate armor over a simple tunic, wielding a short sword and round shield, short brown hair, a brave confident expression

mage.label: 魔法使い
mage.desc: a mage girl in a flowing blue robe with a tall pointed wizard hat, holding a wooden staff topped with a glowing crystal, long violet hair, a curious mystical expression

priest.label: 僧侶
priest.desc: a priest girl in white-and-gold holy robes with a simple veil, holding a small mace with a holy symbol, soft platinum-blonde hair, a gentle kind expression

thief.label: 盗賊
thief.desc: a thief girl in a dark hooded cloak and leather outfit, twin daggers at her belt, short messy auburn hair peeking from the hood, a sly playful smirk

samurai.label: 侍
samurai.desc: a samurai girl in traditional lamellar armor over a red-and-white kimono, a katana sheathed at her hip, long black hair tied back, a calm disciplined expression

ninja.label: 忍者
ninja.desc: a ninja girl in a fitted dark grey-and-purple outfit with a face scarf pulled down, kunai strapped to her thigh, short black hair, a sharp stealthy gaze

sage.label: 賢者
sage.desc: a sage girl in an ornate robe blending arcane purple and holy white, holding a tall staff topped with both a crystal and a small holy emblem, silver hair, a wise serene expression

paladin.label: パラディン
paladin.desc: a paladin girl in gleaming golden-white holy armor with a small holy-water flask at her belt, a sword and a kite shield marked with a holy emblem, long golden hair, a righteous determined expression
